rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to component ports.
Use visible identifiers from the AADL model to define assumptions and guarantees.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type annexes are the standard location for assumptions and guarantees.
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions in AGREE.
Avoid using AADL property names directly as AGREE variables.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq` for defining boolean expressions in AGREE.
Define range assumptions using named constants or visible feature names.
anti_patterns: Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers unless the port is explicitly AGREE bool.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
